title: GINSENG
description: Ginseng is an adaptogenic herb used for thousands of years in traditional medicine. It contains ginsenosides that support energy, cognitive function, immune health, and stress resilience. Common varieties include Panax ginseng (Asian) and American ginseng.

research.title: Ginseng: A dietary supplement as immune-modulator in various diseases
research.summary: Ginseng has potential as a dietary supplement for modulating immunity against various diseases, including cancer, autoimmune diseases, and viral and bacterial infections.

research.title: A Review of Authenticity and Authentication of Commercial Ginseng Herbal Medicines and Food Supplements
research.summary: Authenticity of commercial ginseng herbal products varies globally, with 76% being authentic and 24% adulterated.

research.title: Ginseng for cognition
research.summary: Ginseng may improve cognitive function, behavior, and quality of life in healthy individuals without significant adverse events.

research.title: Pharmacological potential of ginseng and its major component ginsenosides
research.summary: Ginseng has potential therapeutic benefits, including antioxidative, anticancer, and immune system enhancement, but may have drug interactions.

research.title: Ginseng in Traditional Herbal Prescriptions
research.summary: Ginseng's functions in traditional herbal prescriptions have been studied and may contribute to expanding its use in modern therapeutic interventions.

research.title: Efficacy and safety of ginseng
research.summary: Ginseng's efficacy and safety remain inconclusive, with contradictory evidence in epidemiological and clinical studies.

research.title: Ginseng as a Treatment for Fatigue: A Systematic Review
research.summary: Ginseng shows promise as a viable treatment for fatigue in people with chronic illness, but more methodologically strong research is needed.

sentiment.summary: Users commonly report improved energy, mental clarity, and stress resilience. Quality and type of ginseng significantly impact results. Generally well-tolerated with long history of safe use.

effects.label: Type Matters:
effects.description: Panax ginseng (Asian) more stimulating; American ginseng more calming.

effects.label: Cumulative Benefits:
effects.description: Effects often improve with continued use.

dosage.label: Cycling:
dosage.description: Traditional use often includes cycling periods.

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: May cause sleep issues if taken late in day.

sideEffects.label: Drug Interactions:
sideEffects.description: May interact with blood thinners and diabetes medications.

availability.label: Widely Available:
availability.description: Found in health food stores and pharmacies worldwide.

availability.label: Multiple Forms:
availability.description: Capsules, teas, tinctures, and whole root.

availability.label: Price Varies:
availability.description: Quality ginseng can be expensive; beware of cheap imitations.
